entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

Thank you so mụch for this blog.

I'm a SAP MM Functional Consutant (S4 HANA) from Vietnam. I've been working in SAP fields for 3 years now. I have knowledge on SAP S4 HANA Sourcing and Procurement but not certified.

I identified as a person for this certification because I am a women, single, first generation college graduate in my family, people in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts, people looking to switch their careers.

I graduated from university with a major in accounting. But when I learned about SAP, I realized I really love learning and working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes and save working time. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career. 

I’ve just completed my learning journey across "Discovering the Basics of SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing". So I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements. I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks & Regards,

Nhan Nguyen.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hi John,

@pi_consultant1 wrote:

Hi Caner,

I selected the Receiver 2 as a default Receiver and when I test it with 2 receiver it works 🙂

But I didnt think it would matter but there is also another Receiver where all file should go to. 

So when I add this receiver (receiver 3) than the files dont go to default receiver (Receiver 2) anymore. 

Any idea why is that? And how to solve it?

Thank you!

"Default Receiver" selection works as "otherwise". If the iFlow cannot find any receiver, the "Default Receiver" becomes the receiver. In your case "Receiver 2" cannot receive files if it defined as the "Default Receiver" and "Receiver 3" is the receiver where all file should go to.

In this case, it's necessary to define the correct Xpath statement for "Receiver 2".

Good luck.

Caner.

entry.title: Datasphereのローカルテーブルのデータをエクスポートする方法
entry.content:
Datasphereにあるローカルテーブルのデータをcsvファイル形式などでエクスポートする方法をご存じの方いらっしゃいますでしょうか？

「データビルダ → ローカルテーブル詳細画面 → データエディタ」からテーブルデータを編集することはできるのですが、エクスポートのボタンだけ見当たらないなと思っています。

entry.title: Bank key for International banks
entry.content:
Hi,

I understand we can use SWIFT or Routing numbers for bank keys. If I am opting to use Routing Number, what would the Bank Key configuration look like for non-North American banks that do not have a routing number?

My analysis so far has been as follows:

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bank_code

All banks should have a bank code (bank key in SAP ?)

Let’s take an example: westpac new zealand limited (SWIFT code is: WPACNZ2W)
As per New Zealand, bank account numbers in NZD follow a standardised format of 16 digits:

  • a prefix representing the bank and branch (six digits), otherwise known as the Bank code;
  • the body (seven digits); and
  • the suffix representing the product/account type (two or three digits).

reference: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Zealand_bank_account_number

So this means that there should be a six digit bank code for this bank and branch (similar to routing in NA).

For Westpac New Zealand: six digits start with 03 (Westpac) followed by four digits for branch

https://www.westpac.co.nz/help/how-is-a-westpac-account-number-structured/

 

Let's take another example For ASB bank: first six digits of complete account number is the bank code. ASB should start with 12 or 24.

https://www.asb.co.nz/foreign-exchange/managing-your-account-overseas-guide.html#:~:text=BSB%20or%20Sort%20Code%3A%20If,for%20example%2012%2D3086

https://www.newzealandbankcodes.com/

 

Am I in the right direction and should I ask the client to get this information from the business partner or should I be using some other identifier as Bank Key?

Thank you

entry.content: The accounts are classified as expense accounts

entry.title: Re: generating qrcode using image url in crystal report
entry.content: Perhaps you need an API key from Google.  You may have exceeded the number of times you can generate the QR Code.

entry.title: Re: Media collection not editable in SmartEdit
entry.content: I ended up wrapping the media image inside a CMSImageComponent. SAP Commerce cannot display a collection of Medias but it can display a collection of CMS Components

Azmath.

entry.title: Re: In the sales order header prices are getting zero or...
entry.content: Header condition need to add manually

entry.title: Re: fiscal year and standard year in the same model in SA...
entry.content:
Hi RafaelMachado , 

   Not sure why you really need two date dimension to achieve this. You can have both fiscal year and calendar year on the same time dimension for either data action or filter in story. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: SAC Custom Widget for Uploading a load file(.xls) cus...

Hi bekaertsac, 

   I assume the new custom widget by using data export API doesn't support onFileUpload event at all. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: EWM Wave capacity

entry.title: Re: Check Table exist and display its records in CDS
entry.content:
Hi,

this is exactly the behavior of LEFT OUTER JOIN.

 

Best regards, 

Michael

entry.title: Re: Datasphereのローカルテーブルのデータをエクスポートする方法
entry.content:
基本的な思想としてDatasphereではCSVファイルでのダウンロードを推奨していませんが、方式については下記のブログを参考にしていただけたらと思います。

https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/168123

基本的にはOpen SQL Schema経由でアクセスすることになると思いますが、今回のようなDatasphere内のローカルテーブルが対象の場合は、Open SQL Scheamではテーブルに対しての直接のアクセスができないので、ビューを当該テーブルに被せた形で、そのビューを公開可能にした上でアクセスする方式になると思います(少し手間が掛かります...)。

よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Re: Question about notification in SAPS/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We usually send an email when follow-up is needed.

If you want to notify users within the launchpad, you can use launchpad push notifications. However, I'm not sure whether these notifications are delivered in real-time or if users need to refresh the launchpad to see them.

entry.title: Re: Datasphereのローカルテーブルのデータをエクスポートする方法
entry.content:
椛田様

早速のご回答ありがとうございます。
リンクでいただきましたブログの手順、参考にさせていただきます。

（余談にはなってしまいますが、椛田様のDSP関連のブログ、大変参考にさせていただいております。今後の更新も楽しみにしています）

entry.title: Re: Datasphereのローカルテーブルのデータをエクスポートする方法
entry.content: あ、いや、そんな、、、恐縮です、ありがとうございます笑。また、現場で困っていることなどを教えていただきつつ、有益な情報発信に努めていきます。ありがとうございます。

entry.title: What is the Scope Item for returnable packaging material?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

What is the Scope Item for returnable packaging material?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What is the Scope Item for returnable packaging mater...
entry.content:
According to your mentioned keywords "Returnable" and "packaging material", attach the the below scope items which may fulfill your requirement:

Customer Returns (BKP)

Sell from Stock (BD9)

Customer Returns for Sales Kits (5CX)

Sales Order Processing for Sales Kits (31Q)

entry.title: Re: Fleet Management SAP PM - two fuel cards
entry.content:
Hi,

In Equipment Master data you can maintain only one fuel card.

If you want to monitor card wise usage you need create different measuring points for fuel card and use transfer functionality for this.

Here is blog for your reference to use transfer functionality.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/measurement-reading-transfer-a-useful-functionality/ba-p/13255085

Regards

entry.title: Re: Fleet Management SAP PM - two fuel cards
entry.content: Dear Raheel,

entry.title: Re: Fleet Management SAP PM - two fuel cards
entry.content:
Dear Raheel,

I didn´t think of the measuring points so far, even though I already know them well. Based on your suggestions I could do:

I could create a Z-field to hold the additional fuel card number and than create three measuring points - one for each of the fuel cards and a third for the sum of both, which could then also used for the calculation of the consumption of the vehicle.

Thanks a lot 🙂.

Sunnyi

entry.title: Career Development planning implementation
entry.content:
HI , My client is using SAP HCM for masterdata. And they want to implement SuccessFactors Career development planning for career pathing by integrating with SAP HCM. But they have a plan to migrate from HCM to SuccessFactors in next 1 or 2 years. But they have thought to implement CDP meanwhile in this short term 

Please suggest if that is a best way to implement CDP with SAP HCM and then integrate it with implement employee central in future. Will that effect CDP in anyway technically ?

entry.title: Re: STEPS for creating IDOC .
entry.content: Awesome explanation man.

entry.title: A Maintenanace Plan from MPLA is not creating data in MMPT
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I'm facing an issue where MPLA isn't generating any data for retrieval in MMPT/MHIS. I've come across some discussions regarding this matter, referencing note: https://me.sap.com/notes/331278/E . However, I couldn't locate the function Z_STRATEGY_PLANS_WO_COUNTER. Could someone clarify what this counter signifies in the context of maintenance plans?

Additionally, I've attempted to retrieve data from tables T351, T351T, T006, and TFACD, but haven't had much success. While I managed to identify the measurement unit for the cycle, I couldn't find the corresponding amount.

One notable observation is that I'm based in Brazil. When users access SAP in Portuguese-Brazilian language, they can view the cycle of the plan. However, this information isn't displayed when accessing SAP in English.

 
Is that problem something related from strategy attached in the plan?
I hope some of you can help me

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 11
entry.content:
Links to resources mentioned in this episode:

  • This week's SAP Developer News https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FVAali4nfLQ
  • Four CodeJams running today https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/eb-p/codejam-events 
  • SAP CodeTalk on "the CAP plugin concept" with Daniel Schlachter https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cG-cMqAhqyQ
  • (Capire) Domain Modeling - Compositions https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/domain-modeling#compositions 
  • The repo for this back to basics series https://github.com/qmacro/capb2b 
  • Easily add an explicit cds.requires.db to your CAP project's package.json https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/04/14/easily-add-an-explicit-cds.requires.db-to-your-cap-project's-package.json/ 
  • Running non-production CAP services in CF https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/04/15/running-non-production-cap-services-in-cf/ 
  • Using @cap-js/sqlite in CF for your CAP services https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/04/15/using-@cap-jssqlite-in-cf-for-your-cap-services/ 
  • Simple script for previewing CDS models in CSN - cdsray https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/04/17/simple-script-for-previewing-cds-models-in-csn-cdsray/
  • Avoid design time CAP server restarts when maintaining local data files https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/04/10/avoid-design-time-cap-server-restarts-when-maintaining-local-data-files/ 
  • bat https://github.com/sharkdp/bat
  •

entry.title: Trigger Basic Idoc from scratch
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create an Idoc from scratch without using any standard things. Let's say I have a custom table named EmpTable in my sender system. I want to transfer the table(just the fields or with the table entries also). So how do I achieve this?

I can create the segments, idoc type, message type and also the process code and function module to write my custom code. But my question is that how do I trigger my idoc. How do I send the Idoc from my sender system to the receiver system. Let's assume that the logical system is also created.

Is there any tcode to execute the idoc or do we have to create it using MPP?

Regards

Bharath

entry.title: Building Low Code Extensions with Key User Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA and SAP Build
entry.content:
More than one year ago, SAP announced SAP Build, a toolset for creating low code / now code (LCNC) extension on SAP BTP (Low-Code App Development and Automation Solutions | SAP Build). In this blog I want to share my ideas on how both tools can be combined to build powerful extensions.

 

Who Are Key Users?

Who are key users? An excellent answer to this question has been given by my colleague @Jocelyn_Dart  in her blog SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – What is Key User Exten... - SAP Community. I want to briefly summarize it here: key users are users who are authorized to make changes on behalf of other users, typically for the users of a special group or department. Examples are:

  • During your project, you might designate your functional consultants as your key users to make some initial adjustments as they discuss business needs directly with your business stakeholders.
  • Some organizations have a central process governance group who might be designated as responsible for key user changes or for certain types of key user extensions. For example, you might want your central process governance group to control adding custom fields, so that you don't end up with several teams creating similar fields.
  • You might give some key user capabilities to your IT team or even selected developers – as key user functions can be the most effective way to extend your apps and the essential way to add custom fields. For example, as you build your skills into intelligent technologies, you might want your IT team to make some initial settings for your pilot machine learning or situation handling use cases.

Key user extensibility uses a no-code/low-code approach so business users can make the changes themselves. Thus, you can minimize lost-in-translation errors and communication overhead between business and IT.

 

What do key users expect?

Well, key users expect that they can create extensions:

  • Simple – no-code/low-code (LCNC)
  • Cost-effective – with minimum cost/effort/skill
  • Upgrade-stable – extensions are automatically retained as you upgrade releases
  • Safe - changes can be tested in a draft mode, they can be undone or reset, if needed

Example: You all know that business processes require governance processes and not all processes are handled by central IT systems. So, key users start creating excels or word templates and over time they will add more and more logic (calculations, validations, etc. to it). But in the end, the data in the excel or word files must be synchronized with the central IT systems. So the more key users can adapt the system itself, the less overhead for data synchronization is needed.

 

What are Key User Extensibility Tools and What is SAP Build?

Key User Extensibility Tools are Fiori apps that are part of SAP S/4HANA ( SAP S/4HANA ) (or other products such as SAP IBP) and that can be used by key users to adapt SAP applications and services (e.g. adapt the UI, forms, add custom fields and logic) or to create small custom applications (e.g. create custom CDS views, custom business objects, …). In other words, it is the LCNC offering that is embedded in the prod

SAP Build ( SAP Build ) is a set of LCNC tools on SAP BTP that consi

  • SAP Build Apps is a visual programming environment where citizen and professional developers can build enterprise-ready custom applications without writing any code. With hundreds of pre-built components and logic functions, you can jumpstart your application projects and reduce development time. Explore how you can develop web and native mobile cross-platform apps while integrating to other SAP systems with drag-and-drop ease.
  • SAP Build Process Automation allows you to simplify automation of business processes with visual drag-and-drop tools. It enables both citizen and professional developers to easily digitize their workflows without writing code. There are hundreds of pre-built content packages and connectors you can use to jumpstart your automation projects and save on development time.
  • SAP Build Work Zone enables you to bring together all types of content, UI tools, IT systems, content repositories, applications, and channels using drag-and-drop and customization tools to create portals, intranets, and workspaces.

The following picture shows the four options for building extensions for SAP S/4HANA in context.

  • Low code/no code options for key users (already explained).
  • Options for developers:  
    • the on-stack SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
    • SAP Build Code or ABAP Environment as the side-by-side extensibility options on SAP BTP

 

Why Two Different Tools Sets? When Do I Use What?

Key user tools are used for local extension. If you want to adapt a Fiori UI (e.g. hide or rename fields on the UI), or you want add a validation for a field, you have to do it locally in the app. And this is why you use the embedded key user tools for this case. Also, if you want to add a custom field or custom tables to the S/4HANA data model and you want to use the data closely together with the S/4HANA data, for example in analytics.

But if you want to create a new UI or a new process, for example a workflow, not only one S/4HANA may be involved; it makes sense to create these extensions in a central “hub” on SAP BTP.

Let me explain this in two examples:

Example 1: New UI for a Custom Business Object

With the Custom Business Object key user app, you can create new custom tables in SAP S/4HANA and on top of the tables CDS views and a business object with a generic maintenance UI without writing one line of code. The CDS views that are generated on top of the tables are available for other key user extensions, for example in custom logic or custom analytical applications. The generic maintenance UI that comes with the custom business object is sufficient for most cases.

But in some cases, you would expect a more elaborate UI for a broader audience. You might even need a UI for users that do not have direct access to the SAP S/4HANA system (= they have no business user in the SAP S/4HANA system). Here, SAP Build Apps is the ideal tool to create an elaborate UI without being a developer and writing code.

The following tutorial leads you through a typical use case:
Extending SAP S/4HANA with SAP Build Apps and Key User Extensibility | SAP Learning

An app is created that helps users in goods inbound processing to check the incoming goods and perform specific checks on the goods (e.g. for chemical or other dangerous goods). The specific checks and check results are stored in custom business objects. An app created with SAP Build Apps uses the standard SAP services for products and purchase orders and the services generated for the custom business object to guide the user through the check process.

Another tutorial that you can use for a start is the following:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-s4hana-crud.html

The tutorial describes how to build a UI with SAP Build App on an S/4HANA OData service, namely the Business Partner. You can adapt the tutorial to custom business objects (CBO) in S/4.        Instead of the A_BusinessPartner entity in the tutorial, you would use the root entity of your custom business object, and instead of the A_BusinessPartnerAddress entity you would use a sub-node of your custom business object.

 

Example 2: New Process for a Custom Business Object

Key users typically define the processes for a specific department or user group, which includes workflow. To empower the key user to implement their processes themselves, it makes sense to combine the Custom Business Object key user app and the process automation on SAP BTP.

Thus, the custom business object is created locally in the SAP S/4HANA system (so that it can be used by other extensions). Conversely, the process is created centrally on SAP BTP, so that they can be combined with other processes and potentially other data sources that are available on SAP BTP.

A typical example is: A bonus plan application is developed as custom business object using key user extensibility in SAP S/4HANA. When a bonus plan is created, an approval is required. This process is created with SAP Build Process Automation and runs on SAP BTP. When the approval is finished, the BTP process calls the bonus plan service and creates the bonus plan SAP S/4HANA.

The following tutorials can be used to implement such a use case:

  • Create a custom business object:
    • Create Custom Business Objects in S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Tutorials
  • Create an approval process and trigger the creation of a business object instance from a process: with SAP Build Build Process Automation
    • Build Your First Business Process with SAP Build Process Automation | SAP Tutorials
    • https://developers.sap.com/group.connect-process-external-sap-bpa.html
    • Note that these tutorials show you how to create an approval process and call a service on SAP S/4HANA for an SAP business object. But you can use these tutorials also to create a custom business object.

Summary

In this blog post, I explain why it makes sense to combine the capabilities of the local key user extensibility tools with the capabilities of SAP Build to empower key users to create powerful extensions without any lines of code.

entry.title: TAX Jurisdiction error for US company code.
entry.content:
Hi,

while posting an entry in US company code. we are getting the below error.

Error in external tax system:(404) not fount

Message no. FS861 

Tax jurisdiction CAZZ is Canadian code. and the company code is US.

How to overcome this issue. Please help. Thanks, in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content: Right now working as an APO consultant, want to explore more about SAP beyond my relm. S looking forward to attend this programe and explore more.

entry.title: Re: CIF queues stay to be processed for days in RUNNING s...
entry.content:
Hi,

If the queue remain in running status you can reset the status in order to be able to restart the queues.
In case you get this message the the queues that the queue is registered then you need to "unlock" the queues in via the unlock icon in SMQ2.

The queue income can not so easily, you can deregister in SMQR based on the queue name CFPLO123456 and example for a specific order. Then the queue will not be picked up by the inbound scheduler.

entry.title: Re: Check Table exist and display its records in CDS
entry.content:
I may not have explained my issue correctly. Let me try with tables and output expected.

Table A

Order (Key)Notification (Key)Operation (Key)Notification text
4000000100000000010notif txt 1
4000001100000010020notif txt 2

Custom Table B (if exist) will not have any data for Order, Operation . It will have data for Notification.

Notification (Key)Notification text
10000003Desc 1
10000004Desc 2
  

Output expected in CDS :

Order (KeyNotification (Key)Operation (Key)Notification text
4000000100000000010notif txt 1
4000001100000010020notif txt 2
 10000003 Desc 1
 10000004 Desc 2

if I add association / join :  i need to be confirmed that table B exist in system. only then i will be able to use that table and access its fields

if i add table function : we have to mention all tables which will be getting used in that method.

 


so, if the table does not exist then i will give error and table function will not activate.

Please suggest what can be other ways.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: can S-user List report be modified?
entry.content: Hi Oscarr, If you would like to enhance the current S-user management report and modify the default report design/outcome, then please kindly raise an enhancement request via the feedback feature mentioned in KBA 3156721. If it’s an issue with the current S-user report that column ‘Additional Note’ does not display as expected, then please create a customer case under component XX-SER-FORME with the detailed issue description. Thanks

entry.title: Re: can S-user List report be modified?
entry.content: Hi Oscarr, If you would like to enhance the current S-user management report and modify the default report design/outcome, then please kindly raise an enhancement request via the feedback feature mentioned in KBA 3156721. If it’s an issue with the current S-user report that column ‘Additional Note’ does not display as expected, then please create a customer case under component XX-SER-FORME with the detailed issue description. Thanks

entry.title: Re: The data action couldn't run because of a problem wit...
entry.content:
Dear @eodiase1,

the error message indicates that the issue is with the parameter setting on data action trigger level.
Please check the settings of the trigger which you're using to run the data action.

I hope this helps.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Updated hash: 5c3104629b15fbfa25d7af7331c03c78676d612b0342e6ca8223b0764f5f1a65

entry.title: implementation partner is different and license partner different SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

SAP B1 implementation partner is different and license provide partner different ?  Is these possible?

Can SAP is allowed to this? 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: CIG transaction tracker handling
entry.content: Hi Mridul, Hi Francois-Xavier.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to "SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP" Developer's Challenge – April 1st, 2024!
entry.content:
Hi Developers, SAP Build Developer Challenge Week 3 post is available here:

Task 3: Theming, Styling and Layout Design

entry.title: Re: CIG transaction tracker handling
entry.content: Thank you both for your replies. As per the handling, I see there seems no customer friendly solution. I also mus admit that it doesn't seem to be a very mature solution considering that whole CIG world is comparable to an interface. Of course we will create an ER but in the past years we made the same experience that this whole process is rather unsatifying - if there is a lack of votes, SAP doesn't feel responsible to provide a solution. In case there are many votes, there are often some other reasons why a solution is not possible. So customers feel like having the chance to change something but most cases are not successful. Coming back to the initial topic and your question, Mridul: I was talking about the possibility to clear documents in CIG transaction tracker. It is possible to reprocess documents. But in most cases it is rather neccessary to resend documents from ERP system after the error has been solved. In that case it would be better to obsolete a failed document in CIG to let everyone know that this case has been solved. Otherwise the failed document will appear in every download for the next 4 weeks.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM MFS Receiving and Processing Telegrams
entry.content:
Hi @SimonSch ,

No EWM MFS does not support RFC1006 out of the box. I know that there were some projects dealing with this but I do not have the details at hand.

You would probably have to go for a proprietary communication layer in a customer project.

Best regards, Tobias

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Views - FAQ
entry.content:
Hello @sapherm1 ,

unfortunately, it seems your requirement cannot be fulfilled with a Custom CDS View. You will need to look into developer extensibility. There is a blog about time comparisons, that you should read which will answer the calculation questions: CDS View: Time comparison - SAP Community

Best Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Bank key for International banks
entry.content:
Hey,

 

In general you find all information related to bank key in the following note: https://me.sap.com/notes/1529550

 

Please let me know if there is still anything which you do not fully understand.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content:
abapGit requires a slightly higher version than yours, so it is no surprise that it doesn't work: 702 SP 8 or higher.

abap2xlsx is known to work down to 7.31 but we have no hard data on still lower versions.

you could install the whole thing in the canonical way on a newer system, generate the transport and import it in the older system: if this works, the devs are very much interested in hearing from you, to update the lowest known working version on the website.

entry.title: Re: EWM Wave capacity
entry.content:
"So, the capacity profile just helps in creating smaller warehouse tasks(work load) which then can be further sorted via WOCR and assigned to resource?"

No. The size of the the WT is not changed. It is just about system performance when releasing the wave and creating WTs.

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: RFC registered program
entry.content: Thank you Ulrich_Schmidt for the clarification. It was very helpful. BR Max

entry.title: Re: Trigger Basic Idoc from scratch
entry.content:
Hi,

You have to create our own custom program to trigger the outbound IDOC. 

 

Regards,

Pradeep.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: Thanks for writing in @eshrinivasan . I am not able to fetch data due to this 401. See the screenshot of API response from network tab. Is there something i am missing here?

entry.title: Purchase Requisition(ME51N) Screen Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi, experts

I'm a new abap developer, I'm having some difficulties.

I need to add a new self-created field in the system t-code ME51N, which is at 'Display Purchase Request Page' -->  'Subject Assignment' (screenshot 1), I checked out the layout in Screen-Painter of this subscreen and found that it is not the same as the foreground page (screenshot 2 3), I drew the self-created field and activated it in Screen-Painter, but the foreground page didn't display it either (screenshot 4); btw I need to read the value of the order field in screenshot 1, I tried to read it with field-symbols, assigned to this screen field, but it cannot work.  How can I make the self-created field display and get the value of the order field?

Thx and best regards!

entry.content: Wrong manipulation, sorry for this post !

Hello Juan,

You have to follow these steps:

Hope it helps.

Miquel

entry.title: Re: Kanban control cycle from WM to EWM
entry.content:
Hello,

We have made a message to SAP. This functionality is not yet available, we need to recreate all kanban control cycle, and thus, lose all existing kanban container.

consequently, we made a specific to ensure a smooth migration.

entry.title: Re: Upload Excel using SAP RAP Only
entry.content:
Hi, 

my guesstimate is that

https://github.com/abap2xlsx/abap2xlsx and

https://spreadsheet-importer.com/

is all you'll ever need 🙂

- v.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3
entry.content: 7926d81cf1c4f900c6d2b79c524552a1c75ca2186ea67d78bbe1cfd387eeb22d

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP开发案例之八：物料临期管理App
entry.content:
紧随这篇博客，今天我们将再次逐步详细地介绍一个利用SAP S/4HANA Cloud三系统来做开发扩展的案例。

 

1. 案例背景

我们经常听到启用批次管理的客户在问是否有对临近效期物料的提醒、是否有对临近效期物料的批量查询报表，在标准产品中要查询相关信息需要检索多张报表，比如库存报表、批次信息等。通过利用开发人员可扩展性，我们开发了一个定制的物料临期管理App，并嵌入到SAP S/4HANA Cloud系统中。旨在帮助企业智能化地管理物料效期，提高供应链管理效率。关于业务上该自开发案例的价值，可参考此博客。

 

每个企业由于不同业务管理需要，可能对临近效期的提醒范围定义不同，我们还开发了警示灯自定义阈值配置app，用户可以自定义设置效期多少范围需显示为红灯，多少范围需显示为黄灯，多少范围需显示为绿灯，自定义设置满足不同企业客制化效期管理需求。

 

2. 后台服务开发

2.1 创建CDS数据模型

创建数据定义YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'YDUEMATMANGE'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
//@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Material Due Date List'
define view YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST as select from I_Batch
inner join YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01 on YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01.Material = I_Batch.Material
                                       and YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01.Plant = I_Batch.Plant
                                       and YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01.Batch = I_Batch.Batch
association [1..1] to I_Product on I_Product.Product = I_Batch.Material
association [1..1] to I_ProductDescription on I_ProductDescription.Product = I_Batch.Material
                                          and I_ProductDescription.Language = $session.system_language
association [1..1] to I_Plant on I_Plant.Plant = I_Batch.Plant
                              and I_Plant.Language = $session.system_language
association [1..1] to I_Supplier on I_Supplier.Supplier = I_Batch.Supplier                           
{
  key I_Batch.Material,
  key I_Batch.Batch,
  key I_Batch.Plant,
  key I_Batch.Supplier,
  key I_Batch.BatchBySupplier,
//  key YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01.InventoryStockType,
//  key YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01.MatlDocLatestPostgDate,
  YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01.StorageLocation,
  YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit,
  I_Batch.MatlBatchIsInRstrcdUseStock,
  I_Batch.ShelfLifeExpirationDate,
  I_Batch.ManufactureDate,
  I_Product.BaseUnit,
  I_ProductDescription.ProductDescription,
  I_Plant.PlantName,
  I_Supplier.SupplierName,
  case when I_Batch.MatlBatchIsInRstrcdUseStock = 'X' then 'Restricted' else 'Unrestricted' end as BatchStatus,
  $session.system_date as curr_date
}
where I_Batch.ShelfLifeExpirationDate is not initial
  and YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit <> 0

 

 

 

创建数据定义YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST2

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'YDUEMATMANGE2'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Material Due Date List'
define view YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST2 as select from YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST
association [1..1] to I_StorageLocation on I_StorageLocation.StorageLocation = YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.StorageLocation
                                       and I_StorageLocation.Plant           = YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.Plant
{
  key YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.Material,
  key YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.Plant,
  key YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.StorageLocation,
  key YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.Batch,
  key YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.Supplier,
//  key YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.InventoryStockType,
//  key YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.MatlDocLatestPostgDate,
  YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.ProductDescription,
  YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.PlantName,
  I_StorageLocation.StorageLocationName,
  YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.BatchBySupplier,
  YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.SupplierName,
  MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit,
  YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.BaseUnit,
  YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.ShelfLifeExpirationDate,
  YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.ManufactureDate,
  YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.BatchStatus,
  dats_days_between(YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.curr_date,YCDS_DUE_MAT_LIST.ShelfLifeExpirationDate) as remaining_days
}

 

 

 

创建数据定义YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01

 

 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Sum of Stock 01'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
  serviceQuality: #X,
  sizeCategory: #S,
  dataClass: #MIXED
}
define view entity YCDS_SUM_STOCK_01 as select from I_MaterialStock_2
{
  key Material,
  key Plant,
  key StorageLocation,
  key Batch,
  key MaterialBaseUnit,
  @Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure: 'MaterialBaseUnit'
  @Aggregation.default: #SUM
  sum( MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit ) as MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit
}
where InventoryStockType = '01'
group by Material, Plant, StorageLocation, Batch, MaterialBaseUnit

 

 

 

2.2 创建Metadata Extensions

创建新的Metadata Extension：YC_DUE_MAT_LIST

 

 

@Metadata.layer: #CUSTOMER

@UI.headerInfo.title.type: #STANDARD
@UI.headerInfo.title.label: 'Material Shelf Life Management'
@UI.headerInfo.description.type: #STANDARD
@UI.headerInfo.typeName: 'Material Due List'
@UI.headerInfo.typeNamePlural: 'Material Shelf Life Management'

annotate view YC_DUE_MAT_LIST with
{

  @UI.facet: [{ id: 'Material',
                purpose: #STANDARD,
                type: #IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE,
                label: 'Material',
                position: 10}
                 ]

  @UI:{ lineItem: [{ position: 10 }],
        lineItem: [{label: 'Material'}],
        identification: [{ position: 10 }],
        selectionField: [{ position: 20 }]
        }
  Material;
  @UI:{ lineItem: [{ position: 20 }],
        lineItem: [{label: 'Material Description'} ],
        identification: [{ position: 20 }]
        }
  @UI.lineItem: [{exclude: true}]
  ProductDescription;
  @UI:{ lineItem: [{ position: 30 }],
        lineItem: [{label: 'Plant'}],
        identification: [{ position: 30 }],
        selectionField: [{ position: 10 }]
        }
  Plant;
  @UI:{ lineItem: [{ position: 40 }],
        lineItem: [{label: 'Plant Name'}],
        identification: [{ position: 40 }]
        }
  @UI.lineItem: [{exclude: true}]
  PlantName;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 50 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Storage Location'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 50 }]
  @UI.selectionField: [{position: 50}]
  StorageLocation;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 60 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Storage Location Name'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 60 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{exclude: true}]
  StorageLocationName;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 70 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Batch'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 70 }]
  @UI.selectionField: [{position: 70}]
  Batch;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 80 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Supplier Batch'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 80 }]
  @UI.selectionField: [{position: 80}]
  BatchBySupplier;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 90 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Supplier'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 90 }]
  Supplier;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 100 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Supplier Name'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 100 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{exclude: true}]
  SupplierName;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 110 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Unrestricted Inventory Qty'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 110 }]
  MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 120 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Unit'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 120 }]
//  @UI.lineItem: [{exclude: true}]
  @UI.hidden: true
  BaseUnit;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 130 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Expiration Date'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 130 }]
  ShelfLifeExpirationDate;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 140 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Manufacture Date'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 140 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{exclude: true}]
  ManufactureDate;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 150 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Batch Status'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 150 }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{exclude: true}]
  BatchStatus;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 160, importance: #HIGH }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Remaining Days'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 160 }]
  remaining_days;
  @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 170, value: 'due_range', criticality: 'Criticality' }]
  @UI.lineItem: [{label: 'Due Date Range'}]
  @UI.identification: [{ position: 170 }]
  due_range;    
//  @UI.hidden: true
//  InventoryStockType;
//  @UI.hidden: true
//  MatlDocLatestPostgDate;
  @UI.hidden: true
  Criticality;
}

 

 

 

2.3 创建Service Definition和Service Binding

 

 我们可以通过预览的方式查看发布的服务：

 

3. 前台应用开发

首先在BTP创建Destination：

 

然后打开BAS服务，选择SAP Fiori Worklist Application：

 

发布完成，部署完权限之后，就可以看到App：

 

以上是该案例——物料临期管理自开发应用的步骤介绍。希望通过此案例的介绍能让您了解到三系统开发能实现的常见功能。

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue
entry.content:
After some more analysis we found that it was due to one of the tools which was restricting certain files to be downloaded. 

Thank you to one who took time and responded. 

BR, 

RM

entry.title: Re: sales order item First Date
entry.content:
Someone say it before "The sales document item "First date" is stored in VBEP-EDATU on the first schedule line."

so why you can not join VBEP?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: Yeah, even tried that multiple times. Any other way to test my Accelerator Hub Key?

entry.title: Clearance by virtual account of summary invoices
entry.content:
I would like to match a customer with a virtual account number for a summary invoice, which is a Japan-specific requirement, and make a Clearance.

1) We would like to know where to find the virtual account number on the bank statements.

2) Is it sufficient to set the virtual account number only in the BP master and the virtual account management application (F2089)?

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition(ME51N) Screen Enhancement
entry.content: @qimingzhennan You missed the screenshots

entry.title: where is customer number tab in va03
Re: [Wrap-up] TechEd 2022 - Build an Integrated Planning Scenario with Data and Analytics Solutions
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I get access to the internal company dataset used in the session?

Thank You.

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi

The issue was that the Datasphere being used was the free guided experience where no external creations can be established.
So the data cannot be pulled from DS into any other target.

Thank you for replying!!

entry.title: SAP BUILD deployment to production
entry.content:
Hello Fellow builders,

I have a very generic question regarding SAP build deployments to production. We have built an application in Dev system and in coming future will be moving it to Production.

The usual process is to export the build application and then upload it in the target system instance. In my understanding, this can be considered okay for initial deployment. But then for all the after go-live bugfixes, which are not that big version in itself, how do we move them to production? Do we have to still follow the Export-Import method or is there any other method to do that?

Please suggest. Happy friday!! @Dan_Wroblewski @eshrinivasan 

Regards,

Yogesh

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
On this page, there is a "Try Out" tab, you can check the API Key there. If the API Key is correct, you will get a successful response on Clicking the "RUN" button.

https://api.sap.com/api/CE_SALESORDER_0001/resource/Sales_Order_Header

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content: Is there any TR to import in data and cofiles folders to import it in my system? How can I donwload these two files?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: Works perfectly fine on API Hub. But throws 401 in the BUILD

entry.title: Workflow Email notification in CP
entry.content:
We implemented Ariba with Central Procurement (3EN integration scenario). Central Procurement will be a hub system with 2 backend connected systems. I this scenario, only the PR creation is taking place in Ariba, and all follow up places will take place in Central Procurement.

Therefore, after the purchase requisition is created in Ariba and transferred for processing and approval in Central Procurement, we would like to send an email notification to the PR requester in case of approval or rejection via the Maintain Email Templates app (F1306) in central procurement.

We have created custom templates to send email notifications in case of (PO rejection, PO fully approved, PR rejection and PR fully approved) but the problem was that the WF initiator for PR/PO (the user who creates the PR/PO) is the technical user (CPI) and not the PR requester who created the PR in Ariba. So, the emails were not sent to the requesters but to the technical user.

How can it be achieved that the requester (Dialog User) gets the Email notification?

entry.title: What are the pre-requisite to get SAP B1 Partner for any company?
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding on pre-requisite to get SAP B1 Partner for any company?

Kind regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Message no. FH047 -System error: insert action type V in table T078S
entry.content:
While running the T.code = F.52 [ G/L account interest running], I got an error

System error: insert action type V in table T078S

Message no. FH047

 

in the Bank loan account i have maintained

in the Bank interest account i have maintained
